info.description: The GOV.UK Notify REST API. Read [our documentation](https://www.notifications.service.gov.uk/using-notify/api-documentation) for more details.
info.title: GOV.UK Notify API

BearerAuth.description: GOV.UK Notify authenticates API calls with [OAuth2 HTTP bearer tokens](http://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6750). You need to use an `"Authorization"` HTTP header to provide your API key, with a `"Bearer"` prefix. For example: `Authorization: Bearer {YOUR_API_KEY_HERE}`
